heading: Omitted
label: 1300i Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , , which provided that this subchapter could be cited as the “Hoopa-Yurok Settlement Act” and set out definitions, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 100–580, § 1102 Stat. 2924Oct. 31, 1988
